hooks.headline: Emergency AC Repair & Installation - Available 24/7 with Instant Booking
hooks.pain_point_copy: Right now, you're losing $3,000-$5,000 every month from missed opportunities. When your phone goes to voicemail or customers leave your website without booking, they're calling your competitor within 5 minutes. In the HVAC industry, 67% of customers who don't get an immediate response will hire someone else that same day. That's potentially 20-30 lost emergency repair calls monthly at $150-250 each, plus missed installation jobs worth $3,000-$8,000. Your expertise deserves every lead.
